executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Test the Report Maker feature at /qa-analyzer/reports. 
IMPORTANT: Use the following login credentials:
Email: fajarabr76@gmail.com
Password: f@jarabd10

Flow:
1. Log in with the provided credentials.
2. Navigate to /qa-analyzer/reports.
3. Fill the form (Service report, select any service, last 30 days).
4. Select an AI model (Gemini or OpenRouter).
5. Click 'Generate' and wait for result.
6. Verify document generation and rate limiting.
Project is running on http://localhost:3000.
